pages.text: Penchant is $(#7A2FBF)tag- and data-driven$(), so it plays well with mods that $(bold)add$() enchantments: their enchantments level up through usage just like vanilla ones, with no patch needed.

Two enchantment tags let packs fine-tune behavior:$(br2)$(li)$(#7A2FBF)#penchant:no_leveling$() - applied at full level, never gains progress.$(li)$(#7A2FBF)#penchant:disabled$() - removed from the enchanting table.

$(italic)Heads up$()$(br)Mods that $(bold)replace$() the enchanting or anvil mechanics themselves may conflict. In most cases, disabling the relevant $(l:penchant:modules/overview)Module$(/l) lets the other mod work as normal.
